title: cyperus planifolius var. brunneus
intro: Cyperus planifolius var. brunneus, also known as the Brown-leaf Flat-sedge, is a variety of the Cyperus planifolius plant, which belongs to the sedge family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus planifolius var. brunneus include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, with its roots and rhizomes being the primary sources for extraction.
